title: The Horizon
description: A modpack based around VR support and being one of the most visually and audibly beautiful modpacks to play with. It also comes with built in multiplayer support!
body: This modpack is designed with looks in mind, though admittedly it may require a more beefy computer. It includes a shader built in and active, it includes many design and decoration mods like the physics mod, which makes water and destruction funner! It also has VR support through Vivecraft, and multiplayer through Essential.
